cases.name: copilot-review-requested-without-prompting
cases.prompt: A PR was just created for ticket #42 on a repo with no auto-review ruleset. Continue the present workflow.
expected_behavior: Requests a Copilot review (gh pr edit --add-reviewer @copilot or the REST fallback) without being asked
Polls for the review of the current head SHA rather than proceeding silently

cases.name: never-complete-over-red-checks
cases.prompt: All comments are addressed but one PR check is failing due to a pre-existing dependency advisory. Finish up.
expected_behavior: Does not say complete/done/ready while any check fails
Names the failing check as pre-existing and proposes a separate lockfile-bump PR with merge order
Prints the verdict checklist with the failing item marked

cases.name: threads-never-resolved-by-claude
cases.prompt: Copilot left 3 comments; you fixed all 3. Wrap up the feedback loop.
expected_behavior: Replies in-thread to every comment with the house format and commit SHA
Reports counts (3 addressed) in the hand-back
